description_long: This is a single athletic running shoe, predominantly navy blue with vibrant orange-red accents and a yellow heel tab. The upper is constructed from a breathable mesh material, reinforced with synthetic overlays for durability and structure. The shoe features a standard criss-cross lacing system with patterned laces and a padded tongue and collar lined in orange fabric for comfort. The midsole is thick and cushioned, transitioning from dark gray to black, and the outsole is rugged with visible dirt, indicating outdoor use. The iconic ASICS logo is prominently displayed in orange on both sides, and a small ASICS logo is visible on the tongue. The overall appearance suggests a well-used, high-performance trail running shoe designed for urban and off-road environments.
description: A navy blue and orange ASICS running shoe with a rugged, dirt-marked sole and standard lacing, showing signs of wear.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the yellow heel tab, padded orange collar, and worn heel area.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the orange ASICS logo, mesh upper, and rugged, dirt-stained sole.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the patterned laces, ASICS logo on the tongue, and reinforced toe cap.
description_view_3: Right side view with the orange ASICS logo, mesh and synthetic overlays, and visible midsole wear.
attribute_logo: ASICS logo on tongue (green/yellow), large orange ASICS side logo
